Tests multiplication of positive infinity with itself in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that checks the behavior of multiplying two `Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY` values in JavaScript. The assertion verifies that the result of this multiplication is also `Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY`, which is consistent with the mathematical properties of infinity. This test ensures that the JavaScript engine correctly handles operations involving positive infinity, which is important for maintaining numerical accuracy in computations. The code is narrow in functionality, focusing specifically on validating this particular arithmetic operation.
